summary: Backend: 16/16 pytest cases passed (root, status, /command flows, AI memory continuity, security, GitHub guard, app generation, all 3 webhooks). Frontend: dashboard loads correctly via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, Motor IA shows ACTIVO with gpt-5.2, otras plataformas PENDIENTE, console input + suggestion buttons + webhook copy-to-clipboard (COPIAR -> COPIADO) all working. No errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: config.py default fallback for TELEGRAM_TOKEN is 'BOT_TOKEN' (and similar placeholders for WHATSAPP/INSTAGRAM/IG_ID). Because .env explicitly sets TELEGRAM_TOKEN= (empty string), os.environ.get returns '' (default never applied), so 403 logic still works. But if a developer later removes the empty key from .env, the placeholder 'BOT_TOKEN' would be considered the live token and the path `/api/webhook/telegram/BOT_TOKEN` would unexpectedly be accepted. Recommend using `or` to coerce empty string to placeholder, or simply default to '' to avoid accidental match.

ai.py loads emergentintegrations LlmChat per request — fine functionally, but no timeout/retry; if Emergent gateway is slow the /command endpoint could hang up to client timeout. Consider adding asyncio.wait_for around chat.send_message.
memory.py is purely in-memory (dict). Restarting backend (or scaling > 1 replica) loses conversational context. Acceptable for MVP but should be flagged in PRD.

server.py uses `data: dict` for /api/command instead of a Pydantic model. Validation is manual (HTTPException 400 on missing 'message'). Replacing with a Pydantic CommandIn model would auto-document and harden input.

actions/server.py runs arbitrary shell with `shell=True` after regex blacklist. Blacklist-based security is fragile (e.g., `bash -c 'rm -rf /'` is not in DANGEROUS_PATTERNS regex and will be allowed). Consider command allow-list or sandboxed execution.
Webhook handlers swallow all non-Key errors with logger.exception and still return ok:true — good for Meta retry semantics but masks real bugs. Add observability/metrics.
test_credentials: VERIFY_TOKEN=12345; EMERGENT_LLM_KEY pre-set; GITHUB_TOKEN/TELEGRAM_TOKEN intentionally empty for negative-path tests.
seed_data_creation: Test created an HTML file in /app/backend/generated_apps/ (slug 'mi-tienda-*') as part of test_create_app. Memory contains test users 't1', 'cliente1', 'ctx_user_42' and dashboard 'dashboard'. No DB rows inserted (memory is RAM-only).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 backend pytest cases + 6 critical UI flows pass on first iteration. No regressions to chase. Future iterations should re-run /app/backend/tests/test_bot_multiplataforma.py as the regression suite. AI tests (test_ai_business_reply, test_memory_context_followup) take ~10-30s each because they call gpt-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key — keep timeouts >=90s.
